languages.text: {n}Пробившиеся через стены корни плотно опутали иссохшую мумию человека. Вам удается разглядеть проржавевший панцирь с эмблемой фон Валанциусов и {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугмент{/g} вместо руки — невиданный вами ранее имплант, сработанный с потрясающим мастерством.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Пробившиеся через стены корни плотно опутали иссохшую мумию человека. Вам удается разглядеть проржавевший панцирь с эмблемой фон Валанциусов и {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугмент{/g} вместо руки — невиданный вами ранее имплант, сработанный с потрясающим мастерством.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The roots that have broken through the walls are tightly entwined around a desiccated corpse. You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пробившиеся через стены корни плотно опутали иссохшую мумию человека. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}

languages.text: {n}壁を突き破った根は、枯れた死体と絡み合っている。そのミイラは錆びた紋章のついた鎧を身につけており、片腕は機械の義手になっている。この手の義手は見たことがない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The roots that have broken through the walls are tightly entwined around a desiccated corpse. You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an augmentation in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 壁を突き破った根は、枯れた死体と絡み合っている。そのミイラは錆びた紋章のついた鎧を身につけており、片腕は機械の義手になっている。この手の義手は見たことがない。

languages.text: {n}Duvarları delip geçen kökler, kurumuş bir cesedin etrafına sıkıca dolanmış. Mumyanın von Valancius amblemini taşıyan paslı bir zırh giydiğini ve bir kolunun yerinde bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogment{/g} olduğunu seçebiliyorsun. Daha önce hiç böyle bir implant görmemiştin. Ogment, inanılmaz bir ustalıkla işlenmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The roots that have broken through the walls are tightly entwined around a desiccated corpse. You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Duvarları delip geçen kökler, kurumuş bir cesedin etrafına sıkıca dolanmış. Mumyanın von Valancius amblemini taşıyan paslı bir zırh giydiğini ve bir kolunun yerinde bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogment{/g} olduğunu seçebiliyorsun. Daha önce hiç böyle bir implant görmemiştin. Ogment, inanılmaz bir ustalıkla işlenmiş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las raíces que han atravesado las paredes están firmemente entrelazadas en torno a un cuerpo disecado. Puedes distinguir en la armadura oxidada de la momia el emblema de los von Valancius y el {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumento{/g} que lleva en lugar de un brazo. Nunca has visto un implante igual, y es evidente que se ha labrado con una destreza extrema.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The roots that have broken through the walls are tightly entwined around a desiccated corpse. You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las raíces que han atravesado las paredes están firmemente entrelazadas en torno a un cuerpo disecado. Puedes distinguir en la armadura oxidada de la momia el emblema de los von Valancius y el {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumento{/g} que lleva en lugar de un brazo. Nunca has visto un implante igual, y es evidente que se ha labrado con una destreza extrema.{/n}

languages.text: {n}破墙而出的树根紧紧缠绕着一具干尸。干尸身穿锈迹斑斑的盔甲，你认出其上冯·瓦兰修斯的徽章。他的一只手臂被{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}取代。你从未见过这样的植入物，它的制作工艺精湛得难以置信。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The roots that have broken through the walls are tightly entwined around a desiccated corpse. You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}破墙而出的树根紧紧缠绕着一具干尸。干尸身穿锈迹斑斑的盔甲，你认出其上冯·瓦兰修斯的徽章。他的一只手臂被{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}取代。你从未见过这样的植入物，它的制作工艺精湛得难以置信。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les racines qui ont transpercé les murs enserrent fermement un cadavre desséché. Vous remarquez que la momie est revêtue d'une armure rouillée portant l'emblème des von Valancius et qu'une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} remplace l'un de ses bras. C'est la première fois que vous voyez un tel implant, qui semble avoir été fabriqué d'une main de maître.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The roots that have broken through the walls are tightly entwined around a desiccated corpse. You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les racines qui ont transpercé les murs enserrent fermement un cadavre desséché. Vous remarquez que la momie est revêtue d'une armure rouillée portant l'emblème des von Valancius et qu'une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} remplace l'un de ses bras. C'est la première fois que vous voyez un tel implant, qui semble avoir été fabriqué d'une main de maître.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die durch die Wände gebrochenen Wurzeln haben einen vertrockneten Leichnam eng umschlungen. Du erkennst, dass die Mumie eine rostige Rüstung mit dem Emblem derer von Valancius trägt und eine {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentation{/g} ihren Arm ersetzt. Du hast ein derartiges Implantat, das mit unglaublichem Geschick gefertigt wurde, noch nie gesehen.{/n}

You can make out that the mummy is wearing rusted armour bearing the Von Valancius emblem and has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} in place of one arm. You have never seen an implant of this kind before, and it has been crafted with incredible skill.{/n}
